subtitle.ja: 左手首に輪をかけて始めます。左手向こう側の糸を右手で持ち、左手首に1回巻きます
subtitle.en: Begin with a loop on the left wrist. With the right hand, take the far string on the left hand and wrap it once around the left wrist.

subtitle.ja: 左手から垂れている2本の糸を右手で持ち、左中指にかけます
subtitle.en: With the right hand, take the two strings hanging from the left hand and place them over the left middle finger.

subtitle.ja: 左中指手前側の2本の糸の下から、左中指向こう側の2本の糸を引き出します
subtitle.en: From below the two near strings on the left middle finger, pull out the two far strings on the left middle finger.

subtitle.ja: 引き出した2本の糸を、それぞれ左小指と親指にかけます
subtitle.en: Place the two extracted strings over the left little finger and the left thumb respectively.

subtitle.ja: 左人差し指の根本の糸を右人差し指で、左薬指根本の糸を右中指でそれぞれ取ります
subtitle.en: With the right index finger, pick up the string at the base of the left index finger, and with the right middle finger, pick up the string at the base of the left ring finger.

subtitle.ja: 左中指の2本の輪を右手で持って外し、右手首にかけます
subtitle.en: With the right hand, remove the two loops from the left middle finger and place them over the right wrist.

subtitle.ja: 右人差し指の輪に左人差し指を、右中指の輪に左中指をそれぞれ上から入れて輪を移します
subtitle.en: Move the left index finger over and pick down into the loop on the right index finger, and move the left middle finger over and pick down into the loop on the right middle finger, transferring the loops.

subtitle.ja: 左手首の糸を全て外して完成です
subtitle.en: Remove all strings from the left wrist to finish.
